title: Performance & Stability Update
changes: NEW: Added Release Notes history button in Developer Menu.
IMP: Enhanced VPN/AdBlock detection feedback in Donation Hub.
FIX: Notification tap now opens the correct app (stale closure fix).
FIX: Version comparison now correctly handles prerelease tags (e.g. beta.1).
FIX: File cleanup only forgets successfully deleted files, preventing data loss on failure.
FIX: Download polling no longer uses stale callback references.
FIX: Auto-update no longer re-triggers downloads for already-queued apps.
FIX: isMounted ref is now properly cleared on native platform unmount.
FIX: Removed redundant condition in verification loop.
FIX: Platform tab visibility guard now correctly prevents hiding all tabs.
FIX: Build code versions no longer incorrectly split into dotted format.
FIX: Haptic feedback only triggers on native platforms, preventing web errors.
IMP: Removed unused String.prototype.hashCode polyfill from AppDetail.
IMP: Added security documentation for client-side HMAC salt.
IMP: Implemented debounced worker filtering for smoother search typing.
IMP: Throttled download polling interval to 1500ms for better CPU/Battery efficiency.
IMP: Added manual Vite chunking for vendor and capacitor libraries to speed up initial load.
IMP: Memoized global modal state and stabilized key hook references in App.tsx.
